meta.title: Online BCA in Computer Science & IT Program | Teksversity
meta.description: Build your tech career with the BCA in Computer Science and IT program at Teksversity. Learn programming, cybersecurity, and emerging technologies with best mentors.

mainEntity.name: What does the BCA in Computer Science and IT program offer?

acceptedAnswer.text: At Teksversity, the BCA in Computer Science and IT program blends core computer science concepts with practical IT applications. You’ll gain real-world skills in coding, networking, and database management—preparing you for a successful career in software development, system administration, and IT consulting.

mainEntity.name: Why choose Teksversity for BCA in Computer Science and IT?

acceptedAnswer.text: Teksversity partners with reputed universities offering UGC-approved BCA programs, blending theoretical knowledge with hands-on learning. Through live projects, industry exposure, and personalized career mentoring, Teksversity ensures students graduate as skilled and job-ready IT professionals.

mainEntity.name: What are the eligibility criteria for BCA in Computer Science and IT?

acceptedAnswer.text: To enroll in the BCA in Computer Science and IT program, candidates must have completed 10+2 from a recognized board, preferably with Mathematics or Computer Science as one of the subjects. Teksversity guides students in choosing the best university that aligns with their academic background and career objectives.

mainEntity.name: What subjects are covered in the BCA in Computer Science and IT program?

acceptedAnswer.text: The BCA in Computer Science and IT curriculum includes core subjects such as C, C++, Java, Python, Web Development, Data Structures, Operating Systems, Computer Networks, Database Management Systems, and Cloud Computing. At Teksversity, students receive a perfect balance of theoretical learning and hands-on practical experience to master these technologies.

mainEntity.name: What career opportunities are available after completing BCA in Computer Science and IT?

acceptedAnswer.text: Graduates of the BCA in Computer Science and IT program can build careers as Software Developers, System Analysts, Network Administrators, Web Developers, or IT Support Engineers. With Teksversity’s dedicated placement assistance and career mentoring, students are prepared to excel in leading IT companies and corporate organizations.

mainEntity.name: What is the duration of the BCA in Computer Science and IT course?

acceptedAnswer.text: The BCA in Computer Science and IT is a 3-year undergraduate program divided into six semesters. At Teksversity, students can pursue this program through regular classroom sessions or flexible online and distance-learning options designed to suit their schedules and career needs.

mainEntity.name: Which companies hire BCA in Computer Science and IT graduates?

acceptedAnswer.text: Leading IT and software companies such as Infosys, TCS, Wipro, Accenture, IBM, Tech Mahindra, and HCL actively recruit BCA graduates. With Teksversity’s strong placement network and dedicated career guidance team, students gain access to top opportunities in both national and multinational firms.

mainEntity.name: What is the average salary after completing BCA in Computer Science and IT?

acceptedAnswer.text: The average starting salary for BCA graduates ranges from ₹3 LPA to ₹8 LPA, depending on technical skills, certifications, and job profile. With Teksversity’s industry-aligned curriculum and placement guidance, students are equipped to land competitive roles in leading IT organizations.

mainEntity.name: Can I pursue MCA after BCA in Computer Science and IT?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, absolutely! Pursuing an MCA after your BCA is a natural progression that enhances your technical expertise in software engineering, database systems, and advanced programming. Teksversity helps you connect with top universities offering MCA programs focused on career growth and specialization.

mainEntity.name: Does Teksversity provide placement and internship support for BCA students?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, Teksversity offers comprehensive placement and internship support to ensure every student is industry-ready. From resume building and interview preparation to live projects and internship guidance, Teksversity helps you gain both technical expertise and real-world experience.

heading: The overview of
BCA in Computer Science and IT Program
overViewOfOnline.subHeading: Build a Future in Technology and Innovation
overViewOfOnline.description: The BCA (Bachelor of Computer Applications) in Computer Science and IT program at Teksversity is designed for students who aspire to become skilled technology professionals. It combines computer science fundamentals with modern IT applications, helping learners understand software development, data structures, cloud computing, and cyber defense strategies. Through a blend of theoretical knowledge and hands-on projects, students gain proficiency in programming languages, system design, and IT infrastructure. Graduates of this program can explore careers in software engineering, data analytics, cybersecurity, and network administration.
keyPoints: Gain a strong foundation in programming and system design
Develop analytical, technical, and coding proficiency
Understand networking, database, and cybersecurity principles
Learn emerging technologies and cloud-based solutions
Build readiness for IT careers or advanced tech studies

heading: Why Choose BCA in Computer Science and IT
Teksversity?

content.value: Choosing Teksversity for your BCA in

means enrolling in a program engineered to build a strong foundation in computing architectures, programming paradigms, and digital systems. The curriculum emphasizes algorithmic thinking, data structures, and software engineering principles that align with the evolving demands of global IT ecosystems. Students gain exposure to modern computing frameworks, distributed systems, and enterprise-level technologies shaping today’s digital infrastructure.

description.firstDescription: Teksversity’s BCA program is structured around emerging technologies and research-oriented learning. Learners explore advanced domains such as artificial intelligence, machine learning, data analytics, and cloud-native development. The inclusion of real-time system design, API integration, and automation workflows enables students to develop scalable, high-performance applications with precision and efficiency.

description.secondDescription: The program goes beyond conventional academics by encouraging innovation, collaboration, and problem-solving through interdisciplinary projects. Students engage with cutting-edge technologies like DevOps, containerization, and cybersecurity protocols, preparing them to architect solutions for complex digital challenges. At Teksversity, the focus is on cultivating technology leaders equipped to drive transformation across industries.

heading: Key Highlights of
BCA in Computer Science and IT

keyPoints: Workshops on programming and app development
Flexible online and hybrid learning options
Mock interviews and coding test practice
Peer code review and project teamwork
Expert tech talks and live coding sessions

Course Brochure
downloadOurCourseBrochure.description: Get complete insights into the BCA in Computer Science and IT program at Teksversity your path to building a future-ready IT career. Explore how our advanced curriculum integrates software development, cloud computing, and cybersecurity to prepare students for today’s tech-driven world.
highlights: Detailed BCA curriculum and specialization modules
Learning tools, mentorship, and certification info

heading: Teksversity
Online Admission Process
OnlineAdmissionProcedure.description: Starting your academic journey is now simpler than ever with our streamlined online admission process. This guide outlines the straightforward steps, from creating your personal student account and submitting basic application details to uploading necessary documents and completing the secure fee payment, all leading to a quick verification and instant admission confirmation.

heading: Upload Documents
steps.details: Submit required certificates and ID proofs.

heading: Document Verification
steps.details: Quick review of documents and payment

testimonialCards.name: Vishal
testimonialCards.review: I took a Data science with ai , IIT Certification course and tejaswi mam helped me to get into the Best course, now I got a job in Accent company with 6.5lpa. Thank you Teksversity Team and special thanks to madam .

testimonialCards.name: Vinitha P
testimonialCards.review: This Dual Certification course in Digital Marketing and Business Analytics is fantastic. The trainers are knowledgeable and the practical projects helped me apply concepts effectively. A must for anyone looking to excel in marketing and analytics!

testimonialCards.name: sadhana chittennoju
testimonialCards.review: I enrolled in the online Data Science course at Teksversity in March 2025. The Python, ML modules, real-world projects, and weekly assignments were very useful. Good placement support. It helped me build a strong portfolio. Great for career switchers

testimonialCards.name: Arun Pasunuri
testimonialCards.course: Data Science with AI and ML
testimonialCards.review: Joining TEKSVERSITY changed the way I learn. The dual certification programs boosted my confidence, and the hands-on training gave me real industry experience. Their zero down-payment EMI support truly helps students. TEKSVERSITY inspires you to grow.

testimonialCards.name: Ramadevi Koduri
testimonialCards.review: Teksversity is the best place to learn dual certification in Digital Marketing and Business Analytics. I wanted to study two relevant courses for my MBA, and their counsellor guided me perfectly. I enrolled in both programs with confidence.

testimonialCards.name: Meghana
testimonialCards.review: My experience with Teksversity was amazing! The counselling session with Sireesha Reddy ma’am at Secunderabad helped me choose the right course. She patiently cleared all my doubts and gave great career clarity.

testimonialCards.name: Divya Peddiwar
testimonialCards.course: Data Science and Python full stack
testimonialCards.review: Teksversity is where growth meets opportunity! Their dual courses and online degree programs helped me learn in multiple directions. The mentors boosted my skills and confidence, and the experience truly transformed the way I learn.

testimonialCards.name: Gayathri Prayaga
testimonialCards.review: Teksversity Education Institution exceeded my expectations! The faculty is knowledgeable and supportive. The curriculum is relevant and industry-focused. I appreciated the career services and opportunities provided. Highly recommended!

testimonialCards.name: Raghavenderan G
testimonialCards.review: Great institute with quality education at an affordable price. They offer trending, industry-ready courses and practical, supportive teaching. Their tie-ups with top universities add huge value. Highly recommended for strong learning and career growth.

testimonialCards.name: Laxmi Gayathri Chelimeda
testimonialCards.review: I took the Data Science course at Teksversity and gained strong practical, hands-on knowledge. The mentors were very supportive and explained concepts clearly. I’m also grateful for the career opportunity I received. A great learning experience
